_doc: Kingdom Flag — central indestructible spawn anchor. ALL army + worker spawns from the SpawnMenu emerge in a ring around this entity. Tagged 'flag' so SpawnMenuSystem can locate it by tag (no hardcoded position). No Health component, so HealthSystem/ContactDamageSystem skip it entirely → indestructible. Static box collider keeps units from walking through the pole. Per V1 §3.3.1 — 1 per base.
